content_body: Our party of 8 stayed at The Great Getaway for 4 days in February 2022. The cabin was immaculate and very well thought out. It was the perfect space for entertaining our "pandemic pod". We only brought food and drinks and entertained, rested and re-fueled the days away. This was our 6th or 7th rental with Cabin Rentals of Georgia and we have always been impressed. Their properties are a perfect way to enjoy the beauty of nature while luxuriating in a beautiful home. Bravo once again!
title: Best Blue Ridge Cabin Rental Company
